title: Boats On Lilypads
description: A mod that makes boats travel through lily pads instead of crashing into them.
body: # Boats On Lilypads Boats on Lilypads is a mod that eradicates the idea of boats crashing into lilypads as a feature. You can now swimmingly ride your boat over lily pad infested waters without breaking them and losing your speed in the process. # Showcase ![Lilypads now submerge!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edb6f4dab0d359cc7e5870aa1d6d72e347ee5387.png)
